note: Pinned catalog. Keep this stable and add new skills explicitly (avoid scraping).

openclaw-bootstrap-helper.desc: Non-developer install/update helper: diagnostics + copy/paste command generator.

aoi-openclaw-security-toolkit-core.desc: (Lite) Fail-closed security toolkit: allowlists, secret scans, and injection detection.

aoi-prompt-injection-sentinel.desc: (Lite) Lightweight prompt-injection detector with severity scoring and rule-based blocking.

aoi-sandbox-shield-lite.desc: (Lite) Workspace safety: snapshots of critical configs and JSON validation.

aoi-squad-orchestrator-lite.desc: (Lite) 3-role squad orchestration with stable pseudonyms and fixed report schema.

aoi-triple-memory-lite.desc: (Lite) Triple memory: file search and decision notes templates.

aoi-council.desc: (Lite) Multi-perspective decision synthesis and consensus templates.

aoi-hackathon-scout-lite.desc: (Lite) Public-safe hackathon source registry and filtering output.

aoi-demo-clip-maker.desc: (Lite) Terminal-only utility to record screen and create demo clips on macOS.
